ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nlp_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "encoding" TEXT /* Character encoding for text processing */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language being processed */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source, usually a file name */,
  "expand_me" INTEGER /* Flag to expand multiword expressions */,
  "include_features" INTEGER /* Flag to include word features with POS tags */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "processing_type" TEXT /* Type of NLP processing */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the NLP model used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_configurations_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_configurations_encoding FOREIGN KEY ("encoding") REFERENCES encodings ("encoding_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_configurations_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "nlp_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NLP task */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task ended */,
  "result_file" TEXT /* File path to the result of the task */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the task failed */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress of the task */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* Amount of system resources used by the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_tasks_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES nlp_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nlp_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that generated the result */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Result data, usually in JSON or text format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result */,
  "result_size" TEXT /* Size of the result data in bytes */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_results_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES nlp_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encodings" (
  "encoding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoding */,
  "encoding_name" TEXT /* Name of the encoding (e.g., UTF-8, ISO-8859-1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the encoding */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the encoding is the default */,
  "min_version" TEXT /* Minimum version of the NLP platform that supports this encoding */,
  "max_version" TEXT /* Maximum version of the NLP platform that supports this encoding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encoding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the language is the default */,
  "min_version" TEXT /* Minimum version of the NLP platform that supports this language */,
  "max_version" TEXT /* Maximum version of the NLP platform that supports this language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., file, stream) */,
  "data_source_path" TEXT /* File path or URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_format" TEXT /* Format of the data source */,
  "source_size" TEXT /* Size of the data source in bytes */,
  "source_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify the integrity of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nlp_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., number, gender) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feature is included by default */,
  "min_version" TEXT /* Minimum version of the NLP platform that supports this feature */,
  "max_version" TEXT /* Maximum version of the NLP platform that supports this feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nlp_feature_inclusions" (
  "inclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature inclusion */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature included in the configuration */,
  "inclusion_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the feature is applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_feature_inclusions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES nlp_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_feature_inclusions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES nlp_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nlp_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task associated with the log */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES nlp_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role, usually in JSON format */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is the default for new users */,
  "min_version" TEXT /* Minimum version of the NLP platform that supports this role */,
  "max_version" TEXT /* Maximum version of the NLP platform that supports this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
